prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电气工程等热门工科专业社会热度持续高位，复旦大学相关专业（计算机科学与技术、工科试验班等）受益；江西省2026年高考总人数约474900人，近年物理类占比约56%-57%，估算物理类考生约27万人，较2025年略有增加，整体竞争环境趋紧；复旦大学位于上海市，属一线城市，对江西省考生有较强跨省吸引力；该校在江西省招生规模相对稳定，本地无显著地域偏好偏移。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次303名、2026年扩招12.5%（使位次数字增大）、学校顶尖层次与高热抖音关注（使竞争加剧、位次数字趋小）、江西省考生总数略有增加等因素，经综合评估后认为扩招与热度因素基本对冲，预测最低位次约326名，区间288–364名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for Physics Category (formerly Science) were approximately 229, 335, 298, 334, and 303, fluctuating around 300, with a slight recovery in 2025 (ranking number decreased). The average over the past three years is about 312; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 303. The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Jiangxi has been increasing year by year: 37 in 2021, 38 in 2022, 38 in 2023, 39 in 2024, and 40 in 2025. The 2026 plan increases to 45, a 12.5% expansion compared to 2025, indicating a significant expansion and intensified competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Fudan University is a 985 Project, 211 Project, and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Ranking, it ranks 5th on the main list, consistently in the top 5 in recent years, placing it at the national top tier. The 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative (related to teacher ethics and school management incidents), but the 2025 reputation is positive (major scientific research achievements). It ranks 4th in Douyin popularity (high heat), with high short video exposure and sustained high application attention. In 2022, there was a signal of a sharp drop in admission scores in Henan (medium attention), but no significant gaps have been seen in recent years. In the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Fudan has 27 disciplines rated A- or above, including A+ in Philosophy, Theoretical Economics, Chinese Language and Literature, Journalism and Communication, Mathematics, Physics, Biology, Political Science, and Marxist Theory, demonstrating extremely strong disciplinary strength and strong appeal to high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Popular engineering majors such as Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, and Electrical Engineering continue to have high social heat, benefiting Fudan's related majors (Computer Science and Technology, Engineering Experimental Class, etc.). The total number of Gaokao candidates in Jiangxi in 2026 is about 474,900, with Physics Category accounting for approximately 56%-57% in recent years, estimating about 270,000 Physics Category candidates, a slight increase from 2025, tightening the overall competitive environment. Fudan University is located in Shanghai, a first-tier city, which has a strong cross-provincial appeal to Jiangxi candidates. The university's enrollment scale in Jiangxi is relatively stable, with no significant local regional preference shift.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 303, the 12.5% expansion in 2026 (which increases the ranking number), the university's top-tier status and high Douyin attention (which intensifies competition and decreases the ranking number), and the slight increase in the total number of candidates in Jiangxi, a comprehensive assessment suggests that the expansion and heat factors largely offset each other. The predicted lowest ranking is about 326, with a range of 288–364.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: The predicted ranking is around 326, with a range of 288-364. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 288 can focus on sprinting for Tier 1 flagship majors (Xianghui Academy, Computer Top Talent Class); those with rankings between 300-340 should mainly target Tier 2 majors (Mathematics Class, Data Science, Integrated Circuits, etc.); candidates with rankings above 340 should use Tier 3 majors as a safety net (Engineering Experimental Class categories, Economics and Management Experimental Class). Fudan University's overall major strength is extremely strong, and even Tier 3 majors are supported by top-tier disciplines.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for History Category (formerly Liberal Arts) were approximately 102, 104, 80, 124, and 114 respectively, with significant fluctuations. In 2023, it peaked at 80, then dropped to 124 in 2024, and rebounded to 114 in 2025. The average over the past three years is about 106. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 114. The university's enrollment plan for History Category in Jiangxi Province remained stable at 19 students from 2021 to 2025. In 2026, the plan is reduced to 17 students, a decrease of about 10.5% compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 5th on the Soft Science main list, nationally top-tier. In 2026, reputation is slightly negative (teacher ethics incidents), but in 2025, it was slightly positive (research achievements). Douyin popularity ranking 4th (high heat), attracting high application attention. In 2022, the Henan admission score line plummeted signal (medium attention), with no obvious gaps in recent years. 27 disciplines rated A- or above, with liberal arts related: Philosophy A+, Theoretical Economics A+, Chinese Language and Literature A+, Journalism and Communication A+, Political Science A+, Marxist Theory A+, Sociology A, Law A-, etc., showcasing top-tier humanities and social sciences strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Social popularity of liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language and Literature, and Journalism and Communication is polarized (Law recommended, Chinese Language recommended, Journalism and Communication clearly discouraged). In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in Jiangxi Province is about 474,900, with History Category accounting for approximately 43%-44% in recent years, estimating about 205,000 History Category examinees, a slight increase from 2025. Provincial control line data for 2025: History Category undergraduate batch 486 points, special type 539 points, both slightly higher than 2024. Shanghai, as a first-tier city, has strong appeal to liberal arts examinees. The university's enrollment scale for History Category in Jiangxi Province is stable, with no significant regional preference shift.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 114, the 10.5% enrollment reduction in 2026 (which decreases the ranking number), the university's top-tier level and high application heat (which intensifies competition and decreases the ranking number), and the increase in the number of examinees in Jiangxi Province, a comprehensive assessment suggests that the easing effect of enrollment reduction and the competitive effect of heat largely offset each other. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 107, with a range of 94 to 120.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking around 107, range 94-120. Fudan University's liberal arts enrollment is only 17 students, making competition extremely fierce. It is recommended that candidates with rankings within 94 can aim for Tier 1 (Economics, Law, Chinese); rankings 100-115 mainly target Tier 2 (Journalism and Communication, School of International Relations and Public Affairs); rankings above 115 require caution, with limited Tier 3 major options. Although Fudan's liberal arts majors are few, they are all top-tier disciplines. Even if Journalism and Communication has lower social popularity, its A+ discipline strength still holds extremely high value.
